intended_use: The Thirona LungQ software provides CT values for pulmonary tissue which is essential for providing quantitative support for diagnosis and follow up examination. The LungQ software can be used to supp
intended_use_full: The Thirona LungQ software provides CT values for pulmonary tissue which is essential for providing quantitative support for diagnosis and follow up examination. The LungQ software can be used to support physician in the diagnosis and documentation of pulmonary tissues images (e.g., abnormalities) from CT thoracic datasets. Three-D segmentation and isolation of sub-compartments, volumetric analysis, density evaluations, fissure evaluation, and reporting tools are provided.
target_condition: Pulmonary abnormalities including COPD and related airway disease
ground_truth: Manual reference standard for voxel-wise fissure completeness; predicate device (VIDA PW2) outputs for volume and density measurements
other_metrics: Lung and lobar volume equivalence: difference ≤10%; LAA-950HU agreement limits -1% to 1%; LAA-910HU agreement limits -10% to 10%; 15th percentile agreement limits -10 HU to 10 HU; fissure analysis Az value 0.95 for LungQ 1.1.0 vs 0.76 for previous version (p<0.001)
